input.user_input: Change the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS. Also change the seat of arbitration from San Francisco to Chicago.

actual: Please provide or upload the document you would like me to edit. Once you share it, I will gladly update the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS and change the seat of arbitration to Chicago.
